flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Webber International University fell 41% between 2021 and 2024 (19.9% → 11.8%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Webber International University fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (50.5% → 41.2%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Webber International University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($29.5k → $33.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Webber International University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($29.5k → $33.8k).
